programmes.show_description: Lisa Vanderpump, the queen of glam and sass reigns over SUR, her sultry Hollywood hotspot and the sexiest place she's ever owned, perfect for secrets and scandals. (HD)

John Torode and Lisa Faulkner invite us into their kitchen for a morning of feel good food. Brimming with recipes, shortcuts, inspiration and tips from top chef John and cook Lisa. (HD)
